segments.text: As expected, it's looking rough like it usually does
segments.original_text: やっぱり悪く漫画は通常はみたいな感じなんで

segments.text: After all, there's that full commitment balance at play here
segments.original_text: やっぱりフルターゲットとそういう部分が兼ね合いがありますからね
さあベルを持っている状況
ここでベル落としと消火栓

segments.text: The Sonic player is over 100 percent damage right here
segments.original_text: 100%を超えているところをソニックス選手ですが
下投げの下スマッシュ

full_text: As expected, it's looking rough like it usually does After all, there's that full commitment balance at play here Alright, holding position now Ledge drop and recovering Getting out calmly The Sonic player is over 100 percent damage right here Coming in close Down throw into down smash!
